tagline: Plumbing, landscaping, fencing, electrical, epoxy, power washing — Celina & North DFW

quickReplies.label: Can you come out this week?
I'd like to get a quote

faq.a: I handle a wide range of home services: plumbing, handyman repairs, landscaping and hauling, fencing, electrical work, epoxy flooring, and power washing. If you need something done around your house, ask — there's a good chance I can take care of it or point you to someone who can.
I'm based in Celina, TX and serve the North DFW area — including Celina, Prosper, Frisco, McKinney, Anna, and Gunter. For larger jobs I'll travel further into Collin County.

Yes. I give a free, honest estimate before any work starts. For small repair jobs I can usually quote right over the phone or a text with a photo. For bigger projects (fencing, landscaping, epoxy floors) I'll come out in person at no charge.

faq.q: How quickly can you come out?
faq.a: For emergencies (leaks, electrical issues) I try to be there the same day. For planned work, usually within a few days. Weekends are often available for non-urgent jobs. Text or call for current availability.

Yes. I carry general liability insurance and I'm licensed for the trades I perform under Texas law. I'll happily share my insurance certificate and any required licenses before starting work on your property.
For plumbing and electrical emergencies in Celina and close-by areas, yes — call me directly. For after-hours or weekend emergencies, there may be a small dispatch fee.

faq.q: How do I get a quote?
faq.a: Easiest: text or call with a description of what you need and a photo if you have one. You can also fill out the request form on this page and I'll get back to you the same day. Or chat with the AI assistant on this site — it can take down the details and send them to me.
